title: Asking for Takeout Bag 要求打包
scene: Tom和Lily吃完饭要求打包剩菜。

lines.en: I am so full. I cannot eat any more.
Me too. But we still have a lot of food left.
lines.zh: 我也是。但我们还有很多菜没吃完。

lines.en: Do not waste it. Let us ask for a takeout bag.
lines.zh: 别浪费。我们叫个打包袋吧。

lines.en: Good idea. Excuse me, could we have a box, please?
lines.zh: 好主意。你好，请给我们一个打包盒。

lines.en: Can we have two boxes? One for the rice and one for the meat.
lines.zh: 可以给我们两个盒子吗？一个装米饭，一个装肉。

lines.en: We can take the food home and eat it tomorrow.
lines.zh: 我们可以带回家明天吃。

lines.en: Leftover food sometimes tastes even better.
That is true. We just need to put it in the fridge.
lines.zh: 确实。我们只需要放进冰箱。

lines.en: Here is some money for the boxes.
Thank you. Let us go home now.
